final:
module adc_24bit (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire reset,  
    input wire [23:0] obf_analog_input,  
    output reg [23:0] digital_output  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin  
        if (reset) begin  
            digital_output <= 24'b0;  
        end else begin  
            digital_output <= obf_analog_input;  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
